strengths: Three clearly identifiable real-world objects with concrete cultural and historical contexts
Strong, mostly precise links between each object and the selected IA prompt
Well-reasoned justifications for each objectâs contribution, supported by relevant factual details
Effective use of TOK concepts (shared vs. personal knowledge, production and representation, ethical implications) across diverse AOKs
Clear structure with helpful headers and a coherent focus on communities of knowers
Comprehensive reference list demonstrating breadth of research
weaknesses: Occasional repetition and imprecise terminology (e.g., âreligious systemsâ instead of âreligious knowledge systemsâ)
Incomplete sentences and truncated paragraphs that interrupt cohesion
Some unsupported assertions (e.g., claims about the film mapâs significance)
Minimal analysis of visual elements in the photograph
Reliance on secondary sources rather than primary texts in places
Inconsistent citation formatting and some uncited references
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Awarding 8/10 reflects the exhibitionâs alignment with the 7â8 band descriptors: three well-contextualized objects, clear and reasoned links to the IA prompt, and strong evidence of TOK thinking applied across history, religion, sciences and the arts. The submission excels in structure and conceptual engagement, with effective justifications anchored in TOK concepts. Minor lapsesârepetition, incomplete passages, occasional imprecision in terminology, under-developed visual analysis, and citation inconsistenciesâlimit precision and cohesion, preventing a top-band (9â10) evaluation. Overall, the work demonstrates high quality and merits an 8.

annotations.comment: Selecting ThÃ­ch Quáº£ng Äá»©câs self-immolation poster as your first object is effective. It is a concrete, historically significant example that invites robust TOK discussion about interpretation within different communities of knowers.

The introduction would benefit from precise definitions of key TOK terms such as âknowledge,â âknowÂ­ersâ and âshared vs personal knowledge.â Explicitly defining these concepts at the outset would strengthen the theoretical framework and guide the reader through your analysis with greater clarity.

The student clearly frames the exhibitionâs focus on different communities of knowers, establishing a coherent context across multiple Areas of Knowledge. This strong opening situates the reader and signals a structured exploration of the prompt.

The justification repeatedly restates the same point and uses imprecise AOK terminology (âreligious systemsâ). Refine this section by concisely linking evidence to the prompt and employing the correct TOK term âreligious knowledge systems.â

The sentence is incomplete and the paragraph ends abruptly. Complete your thought and explicitly connect how differing interpretations of geopolitical knowledge address the exhibitionâs core question.
Linking the thought experimentâs adaptation in the arts to the transformation of specialized into shared knowledge is a compelling demonstration of knowledge evolution across communities.
The concluding sentence is truncated. Complete the argument by explicitly explaining how this transformation answers the prompt and how any loss of precision impacts knowledge integrity.
Your explanation relies on a secondary source (Mouriquand, 2023). Consider citing SchrÃ¶dingerâs original paper (1935) or a primary scientific text to strengthen the academic rigor of this section.

The analysis of the photographâs visual elements is minimal. Consider discussing how composition, audience gaze or photographic framing influences each communityâs interpretation, thus deepening the TOK evaluation of representation.
Object 3 is clearly introduced with a specific title and author, providing precise context for your TOK investigation into the transition from specialized to shared knowledge.

The categorization of âVietnamese Nationalistsâ as a single community of knowers needs clarification. Define the groupâs boundaries and support with historical references to avoid overgeneralization of its perspective.
Providing the year, photographer and historical context demonstrates attention to factual accuracy and strengthens the evidence base for your TOK discussion.

This transitional sentence is repetitive and interrupts flow. Consider merging it with surrounding content, ensuring smooth transitions and maintaining focus on how each object addresses the exhibitionâs central knowledge question.
The header for Object 2 clearly signals a new example, aiding navigation and reinforcing structure. Maintaining this clarity across objects enhances coherence.
Please provide a precise source or citation for this image. Citing where the map originates and its creator will reinforce the credibility of your analysis.
The discussion on ethical implications of media producers influencing geopolitical knowledge is a sophisticated TOK insight, raising awareness of the power dynamics in knowledge representation.

You assert the map is âinsignificant to the plot,â yet offer no evidence. Either justify this claim with a film analysis source or focus on how the mapâs reception demonstrates contested knowledge.
Identifying the nine-dash line as contested knowledge within the human sciences effectively links political power to the production of knowledge, showcasing a strong TOK concept.
The reference list is clearly organized and shows engagement with a variety of sources, underlining the breadth of research supporting the exhibition.
Citation formatting is inconsistent (italics, brackets) and some sources lack DOIs or access dates. Adopt a single style guide and apply it rigorously for academic credibility.
The concise summary of SchrÃ¶dingerâs thought experiment demonstrates clear understanding of the scientific content, which is essential before advancing TOK analysis.
Including the book cover enriches the exhibition by visually grounding your discussion of how scientific knowledge is packaged and presented to different audiences.

The final ethical question is interesting but lacks a summarizing conclusion. Strengthen closure by synthesizing insights from all three objects to demonstrate how the exhibition fully addresses the knowledge-belonging prompt.
Several listed sources (e.g., Drew, 2019) are not cited in the text. Ensure every reference directly supports your analysis to maintain alignment between the exhibition and its evidential base.

rubricCriterionStrandBandContents.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

The exhibition presents
three objects, but the
real-world contexts of
these objects are not
stated, or the images
presented may be
highly generic images of
types of object rather
than of specific
real-world objects. Links
between the objects
and the selected IA
prompt are made, but
these are minimal,
tenuous, or it is not
clear what the student is
trying to convey.
There is very little
justification offered for
the inclusion of each
object in the exhibition.
The commentary on the
objects is highly
descriptive or consists
only of unsupported
assertions.

The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
